query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS homeownerLeads (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  homeownerName VARCHAR(255),
  homeownerEmail VARCHAR(255),
  homeownerPhone VARCHAR(50),
  address TEXT NOT NULL,
  city VARCHAR(100),
  state VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'TX',
  zipCode VARCHAR(20),
  photoUrls JSON,
  aiAnalysis JSON,
  detectedServices JSON,
  matchedPartnerId INT,
  opportunityId INT,
  source VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'trustypro',
  fullCommission TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  status ENUM('new','analyzing','matched','contacted','closed','lost') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new',
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_source (source),
  INDEX idx_status (status),
  INDEX idx_zipCode (zipCode),
  INDEX idx_matchedPartnerId (matchedPartnerId)
);
